Review this frontend code for performance issues.

Focus on:

- unnecessary re-renders
- heavy render paths
- overuse or misuse of memoization
- large bundle dependencies
- avoidable client-side work
- poor list rendering strategy
- image and asset inefficiencies
- route or page-level performance bottlenecks

Output expectations:

- identify the likely bottleneck
- explain why it matters
- propose realistic fixes with trade-offs when needed
